news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
ONGC stock declines following a drop in crude oil prices.
Brent crude falls below $107 per barrel, impacting ONGC.
news.summary:
ONGC stock declines following a drop in crude oil prices.
Brent crude falls below $107 per barrel, impacting ONGC.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed AAA Stable rating for ONGC's Rs. 7,500cr NCD programme.
Ratings for Rs. 500cr and Rs. 860cr NCDs withdrawn due to no outstanding amount.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed AAA Stable rating for ONGC's Rs. 7,500cr NCD programme.
Ratings for Rs. 500cr and Rs. 860cr NCDs withdrawn due to no outstanding amount.

news.title:
ONGC rose 2.5% intraday, defying Nifty 50's 2.9% decline, driven by crude oil surge.
Improved earnings visibility, policy support, and reasonable valuations boosted investor interest.
news.summary:
ONGC rose 2.5% intraday, defying Nifty 50's 2.9% decline, driven by crude oil surge.
Improved earnings visibility, policy support, and reasonable valuations boosted investor interest.

news.title:
Sensex dropped 1,632.4 points (-2.1%) to 75,071.7; Nifty shed 515.6 points (-2.2%) to 23,262.2, driven by global tensions.
ONGC (+1.4%) and Coal India (+0.6%) gained, while Shriram Finance (-5.7%) led declines. Rupee hit record low at 92.5/USD.
news.summary:
Sensex dropped 1,632.4 points (-2.1%) to 75,071.7; Nifty shed 515.6 points (-2.2%) to 23,262.2, driven by global tensions.
ONGC (+1.4%) and Coal India (+0.6%) gained, while Shriram Finance (-5.7%) led declines. Rupee hit record low at 92.5/USD.

news.title:
Crude oil prices surged to $100/bbl from $65 due to the West Asia crisis.
This sustained price rise impacts India's economy and energy sectors significantly.
news.summary:

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions, like the Iran-Israel conflict, boost Indian defence (HAL, BEL, BDL) and energy stocks (ONGC, Oil India).
Sector rotation favors defence, energy, and shipping companies amid rising crude prices and global uncertainty.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions, like the Iran-Israel conflict, boost Indian defence (HAL, BEL, BDL) and energy stocks (ONGC, Oil India).

news.title:
ONGC awards a ₹125 crore contract to CIPL for AI-powered IT infra upgrade across 47 locations over 3 years.
CIPL to enhance ONGC's IT operations, security, and resilience using AI-driven tech, involving 450 professionals.
news.summary:

news.title:
Seamec Ltd shares surged 7% after securing ₹410.7 cr vessel O&M order from ONGC.
Stock hit ₹1420, marking a 7.3% intraday rise, highest since Jan 29, 2023.
news.summary:
Seamec Ltd shares surged 7% after securing ₹410.7 cr vessel O&M order from ONGC.

news.title:
HSBC downgrades OMCs to hold; lowers earnings & multiples.
ONGC gains from higher crude; target price raised to ₹240.
news.summary:

news.title:
ONGC and Oil India shares see double-digit gains, outperforming sector in 2026.
Iran-Israel crisis raises speculation on further upside for these stocks.
news.summary:
ONGC and Oil India shares see double-digit gains, outperforming sector in 2026.

news.title:
Macquarie retains Outperform on ONGC with ₹300 TP, cut ~3%, citing sustained production growth for re-rating.
Declines to stabilize by 2025; major production ramp-up in 2026; ~6% dividend yield supports outlook amid oil price volatility.
news.summary:
Macquarie retains Outperform on ONGC with ₹300 TP, cut ~3%, citing sustained production growth for re-rating.
Declines to stabilize by 2025; major production ramp-up in 2026; ~6% dividend yield supports outlook amid oil price volatility.

news.title:
ONGC detected unusual bids of exactly ₹7,000/tonne in a 2018 cement tender.
India Cements responded wryly to ONGC's query on the bidding anomaly.

news.title:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.
news.summary:
